\"Record, when relevant, the start and t: "Rekhoda, apho kufanelekileyo, umhla wokuqala nowokuphela kobudlelwane." (ISDF 6.3) Ngenisa umhla ngendlela ofuna ubonakale ngayo kwiphepha lokujonga lomsebenzi, usebenzisa izichazi okanye iimpawu zokubhala ukubonisa ukungaqiniseki xa kufuneka.
\"Use this note to record any other desc: "Sebenzisa eli nqaku ukurekhoda naluphi na olunye ulwazi lwenkcazelo olubonwa lubalulekile kodwa olungangeni kwiinkcazelo zamanye amanqaku." (RAD 1.8B21)

<strong>Label:</strong> Enter a name for:
Ileyibhile: Ngenisa igama lenkalo yesichongi esizezinye elibonisa injongo nokusetyenziswa kwayo.
Isichongi: Ngenisa ikhowudi yesalathiso yakudala, isichongi esizezinye, okanye nawuphi na umtya woonobumba namanani onxulumene nerekhodi.
A coded designation for the copyright st: Isichongi esinekhowudi semo yelungelo lobunini lento ngexesha inkcazo yamalungelo irekhodwa.
A list of special chars, separated by co: Uluhlu lweempawu ezikhethekileyo, ezahlulwe ngekoma, ekufuneka zibalekiswe kwimibuzo yomtya.
A slug based on this name already exists: I-slug esekelwe kweli gama sele ikhona, ngoko inombolo yongezwe ukuyenza yodwa.
A slug based on this title already exist: I-slug esekelwe kwesi sihloko sele ikhona, ngoko inombolo yongezwe ukuyenza yodwa.
Add an alpha-numeric code to uniquely id: Yongeza ikhowudi yoonobumba namanani ukuchonga lo vimba we-OAI ngokukodwa ngaphakathi kwedomeyini yenethiwekhi yawo, ukuze kudalwe isichongi esisodwa esihambelana ne-OAI, umzekelo oai:foo.org:repositorycode_10001
Add container links (duplicate links wil: Yongeza amakhonkco esikhongozeli (amakhonkco aphindaphindiweyo aza kungahoywa)
Add your digital objects by dragging and: Yongeza izinto zakho zedijithali ngokutsala nokulahla iifayile zasekuhlaleni kwiphaneli engezantsi, okanye ucofe ikhonkco lokubhrawuza ukuze uvule isikhangeli seefayile sakho.
Additional information about the license: Ulwazi olongezelelweyo malunga nelayisensi, njengabantu bonxibelelwano, imihla yezenzo, okanye ukutolikwa. Eli nqaku linokubonisa nendawo ekuyo ilayisensi, ukuba ifukubaneka kwi-intanethi okanye ifakwe ngaphakathi kwento ngokwayo.
All descendants or just digital objects: Zonke izinto ezingaphantsi okanye izinto zedijithali kuphela
Allow any valid URI PATH segment charact: Vumela nawuphi na unobumba osemthethweni wecandelo le-URI PATH ukuba avele kwi-slug, kuquka ii-glyph ze-UTF-8. Oonobumba be-IRI abathintelweyo ( /?#{} ) kunye nezithuba ezibhaliweyo ziya kutshintshwa ngemigca emifutshane.
An API key must be sent in the HTTP requ: Isitshixo se-API kufuneka sithunyelwe kwi-header ye-HTTP request ZZZ ukuqinisekisa izicelo.
An identifying designation for the statu: Isichongi somthetho. Sebenzisa indlela eqhelekileyo yokucaphula xa isebenza, umzekelo isicatshulwa sebhibliyografi.
Any field except finding aid text: Nayiphi na inkalo ngaphandle kombhalo wesikhokelo sokufukubana
Isebenza kuphela kwiisayithi ezinoovimba abaninzi. Xa isetelwe ku-"ewe", iinketho ezongezelelweyo zokukhangela nokubhrawuza ziya kufukubaneka kwinqanaba lovimba.
Are you sure you want to delete %1% and: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukucima %1% kunye nazo zonke izinto ezingaphantsi kwayo?

Are you sure you want to delete these ca: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukucima ezi captions/subtitles/chapters?
Are you sure you want to delete this ref: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukucima lo mboniso wesalathiso/thumbnail?
Are you sure you want to delete this rig: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukucima eli lungelo?
Are you sure you want to replace \"%1%\": Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukutshintsha "%1%" ngo-"%2%" kwi-%3%?
Authorized form of name - This is a mand: Ifomu egunyazisiweyo yegama - Le yinto enyanzelekileyo.
Basis for the permissions granted or for: Isiseko seemvume ezinikiweyo okanye sesithintelo samalungelo
Bootstrap 2 themes have been deprecated: Imixholo ye-Bootstrap 2 ayisaxhaswa kwaye iya kususwa kwinguqulelo ezayo. Nceda uqwalasele ukutshintshela kumxholo we-Bootstrap 5. %1%Ulwazi oluvetshe.%2%
CSV Validator default behaviour when CSV: Ukuziphatha okumiselweyo komqinisekisi we-CSV xa kuqhutywa ukungenisa i-CSV
CSV validation initiated. Check %1%job %: Ukuqinisekiswa kwe-CSV kuqalisiwe. Jonga %1%umsebenzi %2%%3% ukuze ubone iziphumo zokuqinisekisa.
Cache description XML exports upon creat: Gcina kwi-cache ukuthunyelwa ngaphandle kweenkcazelo ze-XML xa kudalwa/kuguqulwa
Can be text value or URI (e.g. to Creati: Inokuba lixabiso lombhalo okanye i-URI (umzekelo i-Creative Commons, GNU okanye ezinye iilayisensi ze-intanethi). Isetyenziselwa ukuchonga isivumelwano sokunika ilungelo ngokukodwa ngaphakathi kwenkqubo yovimba.
Cannot calculate accumulated dates becau: Akunakwenzeka ukubala imihla eqokelelweyo kuba akukho mihla yamanqanaba asezantsi ikhoyo.
Akunakwenzeka ukubala imihla eqokelelweyo kuba le %1% ayinazo izinto ezingaphantsi.
Check the %1% page to determine present: Jonga iphepha le-%1% ukuze uqinisekise imo yangoku. Ungaqhubeka uhambisa ii-node ukuba awulayishi kwakhona iphepha. Xa iphepha lilayishwa kwakhona, ukuba umsebenzi wokuhambisa awukagqitywa, utshintsho lwakho lwamva lusenokungabonakali kwaye utshintsho olutsha lusenokusilela. Emva kokuba umsebenzi wokuhambisa ugqityiwe kwaye iphepha lilayishwe kwakhona, umboniso womthi uya kubuyela kwimo ezinzileyo.
Children inheriting rights from record:: Children inheriting amalungelo ukusuka ku irekhodi:
Choose the file format for generated Fin: Khetha ifomathi yefayile yezikhokelo zokufukubana ezivelisiweyo (PDF okanye 'Rich Text Format')
Choose whether permalinks for descriptio: Khetha ukuba ii-permalink zeenkcazelo ziveliswa kwikhowudi yesalathiso okanye kwisihloko.
Choosing \"Include descendants\" will in: Ukukhetha "Bandakanya izinto ezingaphantsi" kuya kubandakanya zonke iirekhodi zamanqanaba asezantsi ezingaphantsi kwezo zikhoyo ngoku kwibhodi yokuncamathisela xa kuthunyelwa ngaphandle.
Choosing \"Include draft records\" will: Ukukhetha "Bandakanya iirekhodi zoyilo" kuya kubandakanya ezo ziphawulwe ngemo yopapasho ethi Uyilo xa kuthunyelwa ngaphandle. Qaphela: ukuba AWUYIKHETHI le ndlela, naziphi na izinto ezingaphantsi kwerekhodi eliluyilo nazo ziya kushiywa ngaphandle, nokuba zipapashiwe.
Choosing \"Include non-visible elements\: Ukukhetha "Bandakanya izinto ezingabonakaliyo" kuya kubandakanya ezo zingaphawulwanga njengezinto ezibonakalayo.
Click 'Calculate dates' to recalculate t: Cofa u-'Bala imihla' ukubala kwakhona imihla yokuqala neyokuphela yenkcazelo yenqanaba elingumzali. Umsebenzi uqhuba ngasemva, uqwalasele eyona mihla yakudala neyona mitsha kuzo zonke iinkcazelo ezingaphantsi. Iziphumo zibonakala kwiinkalo zokuQala nezokuPhela kwiphepha lokuhlela.
Click Confirm to delete this physical st: Cofa Qinisekisa ukuze ucime olu gcino ngokwasemzimbeni kwinkqubo. Oku kuya kususa nendawo yogcino ngokwasemzimbeni kwezi rekhodi zilandelayo:
Clipboard saved with %1% items. Clipboar: Ibhodi yokuncamathisela igcinwe ngezinto ezi-%1%. I-ID yebhodi yokuncamathisela ngu-%2%. Nceda uyibhale phantsi le nombolo. Xa ufuna ukuyilayisha kwakhona le bhodi yokuncamathisela kwixesha elizayo, vula imenyu yeBhodi yokuncamathisela, khetha Layisha ibhodi yokuncamathisela, uze ufake le nombolo kwinkalo ye-ID yebhodi yokuncamathisela.
Content in this area will appear below a: Umxholo kule ndawo uza kuvela ngezantsi kwebhanile elayishiweyo nangaphezulu kweendawo zenkcazelo yeziko. Unokusetyenziselwa ukunika isishwankathelo segunya leziko, ukubandakanya umgca wesiqubulo okanye ulwazi olubalulekileyo, njl. I-HTML kunye ne-CSS engaphakathi emgceni zingasetyenziswa ukulungelelanisa umxholo.

Dates of creation, revision and deletion: Imihla ye creation, ukubuyekezwa kwaye deletion
Umda omiselweyo wokulayisha we-%1% we-%2% entsha.  Ixabiso elithi "0" (zero) livala ukulayishwa kweefayile.  Ixabiso elithi "-1" livumela ukulayishwa okungenamda.

Delete current rights in descendants and: Cima amalungelo akhoyo kwizinto ezingaphantsi uze uwatshintshe ngamalungelo omzali.

Delete matches and replace with imports: Susa matches kwaye shintsha nge ngenisas
Describe the nature of the relationship: Chaza uhlobo lobudlelwane phakathi komsebenzi nomthombo onxulumene nawo. (ISDF 6.2)
Determines whether to show a link to the: Determines whether ku bonisa a ikhonkco kwi bhrawuza hierarchy iphepha kwi ulwazi izinto bhrawuza/khangela pages

Did you follow a broken link?: Did you follow a broken ikhonkco?
Digital objects with restricted access o: Izinto zedijithali ezinokufinyelela okukhawulelwe okanye ilungelo lelungelo lobunini ngeke zikhishwe.

Display multiple linked digital objects: Bonisa izinto zedijithali eziningi ezixhunywe nkwinkcazelo eyodwa yoovimba
Do not use any special characters or spa: Ungasebenzisi oonobumba ezikhethekile okanye izikhala egameni lefayile - kuzolondolozwa kuphela oonobumba nezinombolo ezincane (a-z, 0-9) namadeshi (-). Ezinye oonobumba zizosuswa okanye zishintshwe. Ukuhlela igama lefayile ngeke kubuyekeze ngokuzenzekelayo ezinye izinkalo.

Ungasebenzisi oonobumba ezikhethekile okanye izikhala ku-slug - kuzolondolozwa kuphela oonobumba nezinombolo ezincane (a-z, 0-9) namadeshi (-). Ezinye oonobumba zizosuswa okanye zishintshwe. Ukuhlela i-slug ngeke kubuyekeze ngokuzenzekelayo ezinye izinkalo.
Dublin Core, Version 1.1. Dublin Core Me: Dublin Core, Version 1.1. Dublin Core Imethadatha Initiative
Editing the authorized form of name will: Ukuhlela ifomu eligunyazisiweyo legama kuzohlaziya ngokuzenzekelayo inkalo ye-slug ukuba ibhokisi elithi "Hlaziya i-slug" likhethiwe - usengayihlela ngemva kwalokho.
Editing the description title will autom: Ukuhlela isihloko skwinkcazelo kuzohlaziya ngokuzenzekelayo inkalo ye-slug ukuba ibhokisi elithi "Hlaziya i-slug" likhethiwe - usengayihlela ngemva kwalokho.
Email your <a href=\"mailto:%1%\">system: Thumela i-imeyile kumlawuli wenkqubo wakho ucele umda omkhulu wokulayisha.
Enable or disable the display of certain: Vula okanye khubaza ukuboniswa kwezingxenye ezithile zekhasi. Ngaphandle ukuba zishintshwe yindikimba ethile, lezi zilungiselelo zizosetshenziswa kuyo yonke isayithi.
Enter free-text information, including q: Faka ulwazi lombhalo ovulekile, kuhlanganise nezichasiso okanye iimpawu zokubhala zokukhombisa ukungaqiniseki, ukuze ushintshe indlela umhla olubonakala ngayo. Ukuba le nkambu ingasetshenziswa, okuzenzakalelayo kuya kuba iminyaka yokuqala neyokugcina kuphela.
Enter the ID of the saved clipboard you: Ngenisa i-ID yebhodi yokuncamathisela egciniweyo ofuna ukuyilayisha.
Enter ilungelo lelungelo lobunini umhla wokugqibela, if known. Acceptable umhla format: YYYY-MM-DD.
Enter the copyright start date, if known: Enter ilungelo lelungelo lobunini umhla lokuqala, if known. Acceptable umhla format: YYYY-MM-DD.
Enter the email address(es) of at least: Faka idilesi okanye amakheli e-i-imeyile okungenani omlawuli oyedwa wenqolobane. Amakheli amaningi angafakwa, ahlukaniswe ngamakhoma. La makheli azovezwa njengengxenye yempendulo esicelweni se-Identify.
Enter the end year. Do not use any quali: Faka unyaka wokugcina. Ungasebenzisi izichazi okanye iimpawu zokubhala ukubonisa ukungaqiniseki. Amafomethi osuku amukelekile: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, YYYY.

Ngenisa unyaka wokuphela. Musa ukusebenzisa izichazi okanye iimpawu zokubhala ukubonisa ukungaqiniseki. Ukuba unyaka wokuqala nowokuphela bayafana, ngenisa idatha kuphela kwinkalo ethi "Umhla" uze ushiye "Umhla wokuphela" ungenanto.
Enter the start year. Do not use any qua: Enter start year. Do not use any qualifiers okanye typographical symbols ku express uncertainty.
Faka unyaka wokuqala. Ungasebenzisi izichazi okanye iimpawu zokubhala ukubonisa ukungaqiniseki. Amafomethi osuku amukelekile: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, YYYY.

  kuso sonke isikhokelo sokufukubana

If no levels are selected, the export wi: Ukuba kungekho mazinga akhethiwe, ukukhishwa kuzohluleka. Ungasebenzisa okhiye be-control (Mac ⌘) kanye/okanye u-shift ukuze ukheamanani amaningi kumenyu yamazinga kwinkcazelo. Kuyafuneka ukufaka izinga okanye amazinga angaphezulu kwezinga ofuna ukulikhupha, kuze kufike kwaye kufake izinga elisebhodini yokuncamathisela. Kungenjalo, awekho iirekhodi azofakwa ekukhishweni.
If the finding aid is an uploaded PDF, t: Ukuba isikhokelo sokufukubana yi-PDF elayishiweyo, i-transcript nayo iya kucinywa.

If you are importing a SKOS file to a ta: If you are ngenisaing a SKOS ifayile ku a uhlelo lokuluhlukanisa other than izihloko, nceda go kwi %1%

Ignore matches and import as new: Ignore matches kwaye ngenisa as okutsha

It's used in %1% events that will also b: It's used ku %1% events that iza also be kususiwe

MODS, Version 3.3. U.S. Library of Congr: MODS, Version 3.3. U.S. Library ye Congress

Note: Incorrect security settings can re: Qaphela: Useto lokhuseleko olungachanekanga lunokubangela ukuba ujongano lwewebhu lwe-AtoM lungafikeleleki.
Note: While the date range update is run: Qaphela: Ngoxa uhlaziyo loluhlu lwemihla luqhuba, inkcazelo ekhethiweyo akufunekanga ihlelwe.
Note: clipboard items unclipped in this: Qaphela: izinto zebhodi yokuncamathisela ezingasakhethwanga kweli phepha ziya kususwa kwibhodi yokuncamathisela xa iphepha lihlanganiswa kwakhona. Ungazikhetha kwakhona ngoku, okanye ulayishe iphepha kwakhona ukuze uzisuse ngokupheleleyo. Ukusebenzisa amaqhosha okuhlela okanye okujonga phambi kokuprinta nako kuya kulayisha iphepha kwakhona - ngoko nantoni na engakhethwanga ngoku iya kulahleka!

Provide a menu label for users. For men: Nikeza ileyibhile yemenyu yabasebenzisi. Ezintweni zemenyu ezingabonakali (okungukuthi ezenhlangano kuphela), oku kufuneka kushiywe kungenalutho.
Provide an internal menu name. This is: Nika igama lemenyu yangaphakathi.  Oku akubonakali kubasebenzisi.
RAD, July 2008 version. Canadian Council: RAD, July 2008 version. Canadian Council ye Archives
Record a citation to, and/or information: Rekhoda ukucashunwa kanye/okanye ulwazi ngokushicilelwa okuphathelene okanye okusekelwe ekusetshenzisweni, ekutadisheni, okanye ekuhlaziyweni kweyunithi ykwinkcazelo. Faka izisalathiso kukuba-facsimile okanye imibhalo eshicilelwe. (ISAD 3.5.4)
Record a citation to, or information abo: Rekhoda ukucashunwa okanye ulwazi mayelana nokushicilelwa okuphathelene okanye okusekelwe ekusetshenzisweni, ekutadisheni, okanye ekuhlaziyweni kwezinto ezichazwayo. Nikeza ulwazi olwanele ukubonisa ubudlelwano phakathi kokushicilelwa neyunithi echazwayo. Oku kufaka izinhlelo ezinezichasiselo. (DACS 6.4.4)
Record notes on sources consulted in pre: Irekhodi amanqaku ku imithombo consulted ku preparing inkcazelo kwaye who prepared it. (ISAD 3.7.1)
Record specialized or other important in: Rekhoda ulwazi olukhethekile okanye olunye olubalulekile olungahlinzekwanga yiokanye yiziphi izingxenye zkwinkcazelo ezichaziwe. (ISAD 3.6.1)
Record the name of the register which gr: Rekhoda igama lerejista ehlanganisa le nto yoovimba (njengezinto ezibukwayo nezizwakalayo, umsindo, imibhalo yesandla nezithombe). Khangela igama elikhona kukubarekhodi erejista ngokuthayipha oonobumba zokuqala ezimbalwa zegama. Kungenjalo, cela ukuthi kudalwe ukufakwa okutsha kwerejista. Umthetho we-NARSSA ka-1996
Record the name(s) of the person(s) who: Rekhoda amagama abantu abadale okanye ababuyekeze inkcazelo, kanye nosuku lokudala okanye lokuhlaziya. (DACS 8.1.5)
Record, as needed, information not accom: Irekhodi, as needed, ulwazi not accommodated by any ye defined elements ye inkcazelo. (DACS 7.1.2)
Replace existing clipboard results with: Replace okukhona ibhodi yokuncamathisela iziphumo nge kugciniwe ibhodi yokuncamathisela
Report generation has started, please ch: Ukuveliswa kwengxelo kuqalile, nceda uphinde ujonge iphepha leengxelo kungekudala.

Search for an existing term in the place: Khangela igama elikhona ohlelweni lokuluhlukanisa izindawo ngokuthayipha oonobumba zokuqala ezimbalwa zegama lethemu. Kungenjalo, thayipha igama elitsha ukuze udale kwaye uxhume igama elitsha lendawo.
Select a date range to overwrite:: Khetha a ibanga lomhla ku overwrite:
Select a note type from the drop-down me: Khetha a inqaku type ukusuka kwi drop-down imenyu kwaye faka inqaku umbhalo ku accordance nge RAD 1.8B1 through 1.8B6.

Khetha a inqaku type ukusuka kwi drop-down imenyu kwaye faka inqaku umbhalo ku accordance nge following sections ku RAD: 1.5E (Accompanying material); 1.8 B11 (Alpha-numeric designations); 1.8B9b (Ukunakekelwa); 1.8B7 (Edition); 1.8B9 (Ngokwasemzimbeni Inkcazelo); 1.8B16b (Rights).

Khetha a inqaku type ukusuka kwi drop-down imenyu kwaye irekhodi, as needed, specialized ulwazi not accommodated by any ye defined elements ye inkcazelo, including Ukunakekelwa (DACS 7.1.3), Citation (DACS 7.1.5), Alphanumeric designations (DACS 7.1.6), Variant isihloko ulwazi (DACS 7.1.7), okanye Processing ulwazi (DACS 7.1.8).
Select the levels of description to be i: Khetha amazinga kwinkcazelo azofakwa ohlwini lwezinto. Ukuba kungekho mazinga akhethiwe, ikhonkco sohlu lwezinto ngeke siboniswe. Ungasebenzisa okhiye be-control (Mac ⌘) kanye/okanye u-shift ukuze ukheamanani amaningi kumenyu yamazinga kwinkcazelo.
Set if you want to combine the current s: Setha ukuba ufuna ukuhlanganisa isethi yamanje yamalungelo naokanye yimaphi amalungelo akhona, okanye ususe amalungelo akhona bese usebenzisa la malungelo amasha

Text describing the license or agreement: Umbhalo ochaza ilayisense okanye isivumelwano esinikeze imvume, okanye ikhonkco sombhalo ogcwele ogcinwe ku-inthanethi. Oku kungaqukatha umbhalo wangempela welayisense okanye wesivumelwano, okanye ukubeka ngamanye amazwi okanye isifinyezo.

The OAI-PMH API can be secured, optional: I-OAI-PMH API ingavikelwa, ngokuzikhethela, ngokudinga ukuthi izicelo ze-API ziqinisekiswe ngokusebenzisa okhiye be-API (abanikezwe abasebenzisi abathile).
The Title and Level of description value: The Isihloko kwaye Izinga lkwinkcazelo values entered ku oku iphepha kuya kuba applied ku each child inkcazelo kudalwe ye associated izinto zedijithali - '%dd%' represents an incrementing 2-value inombolo, so by default iinkcazelo kudalwe via oku uploader kuya kuba named image 01, image 02, etc.

Umhla osebenza kuwo imo yelungelo lobunini.

The number of records shown per page on: The inombolo ye iirekhodi shown per iphepha ku uluhlu pages
The pdfinfo tool is required to use this: The pdfinfo tool is kuyafuneka ku use oku functionality. Nceda contact yakho umlawuli wohlelo.

Use the actor name field to link an auth: Sebenzisa inkalo yegama lomlingisi ukuxhukubanisa irekhodi legunya nale ncazelo. Khangela igama elikhona kukubarekhodi egunya ngokuthayipha oonobumba zokuqala ezimbalwa zegama. Kungenjalo, thayipha igama elitsha ukuze udale kwaye uxhume irekhodi legunya elitsha.
Use these options to specify how the dat:
Sebenzisa ezi nketho ukucacisa indlela uluhlu lwemihla olubuyisa ngayo iziphumo. "Ngqo" kuthetha
ukuba imihla yokuqala neyokuphela yeenkcazelo ezibuyisiweyo kufuneka iwe ngokupheleleyo ngaphakathi
kuluhlu lwemihla olungenisiweyo. "Iyadibana" kuthetha ukuba nayiphi na inkcazelo enomhla wokuqala okanye
wokuphela ochukumisa okanye odibana noluhlu lwemihla ekujoliswe kulo iya kubuyiswa.
Use this interface to update the authori: Sebenzisa olu jongano ukuhlaziya ifomu egunyazisiweyo yegama, i-slug (permalink), kunye/okanye igama lefayile le-%1%.
Use this interface to update the descrip: Sebenzisa olu jongano ukuhlaziya isihloko senkcazelo, i-slug (permalink), kunye/okanye igama lefayile le-%1%.

We've redirected you to the first page o: Sikukhokelele kwiphepha lokuqala leziphumo. Ukuphepha ukusetyenziswa kwememori eninzi kakhulu, i-AtoM inciphisa amaphepha kwiirekhodi ezi-%1%. Nceda unciphise iziphumo zakho.

Sikukhokelele kwiphepha lokuqala leziphumo. Ukuphepha ukusetyenziswa kwememori eninzi kakhulu, i-AtoM inciphisa amaphepha kwiirekhodi ezi-%1%. Ukujonga iirekhodi zokugqibela kwiseti yangoku yeziphumo, zama ukutshintsha indlela yokuhlela.
When disabled: Finding Aid links are not:
Xa kuvaliwe: amakhonkco esikhokelo sokufukubana awaboniswa, ukuveliswa kwesikhokelo sokufukubana
kuvaliwe, kwaye isihluzi esithi 'Ukukhangela okuPhambili > Isikhokelo sokufukubana' siyafihlwa.
When enabled the following text will app: Xa kuvuliwe, lo mbhalo ulandelayo uza kuvela kwicandelo lemetadata le-%1% ukuchaza indlela umsebenzisi anokufikelela ngayo kweyoqobo nakwikopi yogcino-yexesha-elide yefayile egcinwe kwinkqubo edityanisiweyo yogcino lwedijithali. Umbhalo uvela kwinkalo ethi "Iimvume". Xa kuvaliwe, inkalo ethi "Iimvume" ayiboniswa.

Xa kuvuliwe, lo mbhalo ulandelayo uza kuvela nanini na umsebenzisi ezama ukukhuphela i-%1% master enenkcazo yamalungelo enxulumene nayo apho iSiseko = ilungelo lobunini kwaye iSithintelo = sinemiqathango. Ungalungisa isitayile uze wenze lo mbhalo ngokwezifiso njengakwiphepha elizinzileyo.
When enabled, an &quot;Upload limit&quot: Xa kuvuliwe, imitha ethi "Umda wokulayisha" iboniswa kubasebenzisi abaqinisekisiweyo kwiphepha lokujonga le-%1%, kwaye abalawuli banokunciphisa indawo yediski evunyelwe kwi-%1% nganye yokulayisha kwe-%2%.
When enabled, the copyright pop-up will: Xa enabled, ilungelo lelungelo lobunini pop-up kuya kuba applied ku every %1%, regardless ye whether there is an accompanying Inkcazo samalungelo.
When set to &quot;no&quot;, the reposito: Xa isetelwe ku-"hayi", igama lovimba liyashiywa kwezinye iindawo zokubonisa kuba liza kuphindaphinda kakhulu.
When set to &quot;yes&quot;, the referen: Xa isetelwe ku-"ewe", umtya wekhowudi yesalathiso uza kwakhiwa kusetyenziswa isichongi sento yolwazi kunye nezichongi zabo bonke ookhokho bayo.
When set to 'yes' generated Finding Aids: Xa isetelwe ku-'ewe', izikhokelo zokufukubana ezivelisiweyo aziyi kubandakanya iiUyiloi
You can check %1% page to determine the: Ungajonga iphepha le-%1% ukuze uqinisekise imo yangoku yomsebenzi wohlaziyo.
You cannot show more than %max% hits per: You cannot bonisa okungaphezulu than %max% hits per iphepha
You may only clear jobs belonging to you: You may only clear imisebenzi belonging ku you.
You must show at least %min% hits per pa: You kufuneka bonisa at least %min% hits per iphepha
You will also be able to review and indi: You iza also be able ku review kwaye individually modify each inkcazelo isihloko kwi next iphepha after clicking "Layisha."
Your %entity_type% export package is bei: Your %entity_type% khupha package is being built.
Your browser does not support JavaScript: Isiphequluli sakho asisekeli i-JavaScript. Bona %1%izidingo ezincane%2%.
Your description has been updated. Lower: Your inkcazelo has been kuhlaziyiwe. Lower level iinkcazelo are being kuhlaziyiwe now – jonga umsebenzi scheduler iphepha ye imo kwaye details.
Your edits to this description have been: Ukuhlela kwakho kule ncazelo kugciniwe kwaye inkcazelo ibuyele esimweni sokusalungiswa. Nceda ucele umsebenzisi onezimvume ezanele ukuthi aphinde ashicilele inkcazelo ukuze ibonakale emphakathini.
Your password confirmation did not match: Ukuqinisekiswa kwephasiwedi yakho akufananga nephasiwedi yakho.
Your term has been updated. Its related: Igama lakho lihlaziyiwe. Iinkcazelo ezinxulumene nalo ziyahlaziywa ngokungangqinelaniyo – jonga iphepha lesicwangcisi semisebenzi ukuze ubone imo neenkcukacha.
